title: MBOSE SSLC Admit Card 2026 OUT mbose.in Collect from School

detail.title: MBOSE SSLC Admit Card 2026 OUT mbose.in Collect from School
detail.short_info: The Admit Card for Class 10 has been released by MBOSE. Students who are yet to appear for the examination can download their hall tickets from the official website mbose.in.

sections.heading: MBOSE SSLC Admit Card 2026 OUT mbose.in Collect from School

content.text: MBOSE SSLC Admit Card 2026: The Meghalaya Board of School Education has released the admit card for the SSLC Class 10 Board Examination 2026. Students must collect their admit cards from their respective schools.
MBOSE SSLC Hall Ticket 2026 Released @ mbose.in

Latest Update: The Meghalaya Board of School Education (MBOSE) has officially released the SSLC Admit Card 2026 for Class 10 Board Examinations. School authorities can download the hall tickets from the official portal mbose.in, verify details, get them signed and stamped by the principal, and distribute to students. The admit card contains essential details including exam dates, centre, subjects, and instructions.

sections.heading: MBOSE SSLC Admit Card 2026 - Quick Overview

rows: Online (For Schools Only); Students Collect from School

sections.heading: How to Obtain MBOSE SSLC Admit Card 2026?

content.text: School authorities should follow these steps to download admit cards:

items: On the homepage, click on the hall ticket download link
Log in using User ID and Password
Verify details, add school stamp and Principal's signature

content.text: Students cannot download the admit card directly. Contact your school authorities to collect the original signed and stamped admit card as soon as possible.
After collecting, carefully verify all details including:
Important: The admit card must bear the Principal's signature and school stamp to be valid. Report any discrepancies to your school immediately.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on MBOSE SSLC Admit Card 2026

items: Check exam centre location on Google Maps
Plan to reach 30-45 minutes before reporting time
Keep signed admit card and valid ID proof ready
Follow all instructions given by the invigilators
No use of mobile phones or electronic devices
Do not communicate with other candidates
Raise your hand if you need any assistance
